physical_law_fit_sparse0.interpretation: At u=rank/seq_len fixed, doubling hidden_dim changes KL by factor 2^1.15. At fixed hd, KL scales as (1-u)^4.63 — so as u → 1 (rank → seq_len), KL → 0.

Validate against long-context empirical data (Qwen + Gemma4 running now).
